name: Razorpay Payment Service — K8s Config & Secrets
scenario: Razorpay payment service needs to run identically in dev, staging, and production with different DB URLs, secrets, and log levels. Implement ConfigMap + Secret management with graceful shutdown.

core.description: k8s/payment-configmap.yml: ConfigMap with application.yml containing prod DB URL, log levels, pool size, Zipkin URL.
k8s/payment-secrets.yml: Secret with db_password, redis_password, visa_api_key (base64 encoded).
Deployment YAML: volumeMount for ConfigMap at /app/config, secretKeyRef env vars for secrets, preStop sleep 5s, terminationGracePeriodSeconds=60.
@SpringBootTest (3 tests): config @Value injection, readiness UP, liveness UP. All 3 pass.
README: explains base64 encoding + why Secrets are NOT encrypted by default.

bonus.description: Kustomize overlays: base + dev/prod with different replica counts and image tags.
ServiceAccount + Role + RoleBinding: payment service can only read its specific Secret.
startupProbe: configure for 90-second Flyway migration scenario. Explain difference from initialDelaySeconds.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. ConfigMap as volume: Spring Boot auto-reads files from config/ directory — mount ConfigMap at /app/config/ for automatic pickup. base64 encoding: `echo -n 'value' | base64` (the -n is important — prevents newline from being encoded). server.shutdown=graceful: requires the whole request to be handled before shutdown; combine with preStop to prevent new requests arriving during shutdown. management.health.probes.enabled=true: REQUIRED to get separate /readiness and /liveness endpoints. preStop + terminationGracePeriodSeconds: preStop (5s) + graceful shutdown timeout (50s) must be less than terminationGracePeriodSeconds (60s) — otherwise k8s sends SIGKILL before shutdown completes.
